de'aaron fox.detail: Played 33 minutes, went 0-4 from three in a close Game 1 loss
de'aaron fox.web_narrative: Fox missed the 3PM over by going 0-for-4 from three-point range in 33 minutes of action. He struggled overall shooting 5-14 from the field in a 104-102 Spurs loss.

devin vassell.detail: Played 36 minutes with solid performance in Game 1

jaden mcdaniels.detail: Played 36 minutes with strong performance in Game 1 win

jalen brunson.detail: Played 31 minutes in a blowout win; limited assists in garbage time
jalen brunson.web_narrative: Brunson scored 35 points but had only 3 assists in 31 minutes. The 137-98 blowout win likely reduced his minutes and opportunity to accumulate assists in the second half.

joel embiid.detail: Played 25 minutes in a blowout loss; struggled shooting 3-11 FG
joel embiid.web_narrative: Embiid finished with only 14 points on 3-11 shooting in 25 minutes. The blowout nature of the 39-point loss curtailed his minutes and he shot poorly, going 0-2 from three with limited efficiency.

julius randle.detail: Played 41 minutes pacing Minnesota in Game 1 win

og anunoby.detail: Played 30 minutes in a blowout win; only 3 rebounds
og anunoby.web_narrative: Anunoby fell short of the rebound over with just 3 boards in 30 minutes. The blowout nature of the 137-98 win likely limited his opportunities in the second half.

stephon castle.detail: Played 28 minutes before fouling out of Game 1

tyrese maxey.detail: Played 27 minutes in a blowout loss; scored only 13 points on 3-9 shooting
tyrese maxey.web_narrative: Maxey struggled shooting 3-9 from the field and 0-3 from three in a 39-point blowout loss, finishing well short of the points over with 13. The lopsided nature of the game also curtailed his minutes.

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 40 minutes; struggled shooting 5-17 FG and 0-8 from three
victor wembanyama.web_narrative: Wembanyama missed the points over by scoring only 11 points despite 40 minutes of action, going 0-for-8 from three-point range. His historic 12-block, 15-rebound performance came without the scoring efficiency needed to clear the threshold.

vj edgecombe.detail: Played 28 minutes in a blowout loss with quiet performance
